scripts.load:test:docker: docker compose -f compose.yml run --rm artillery sh -c "npx artillery run tests/load/scenarios/tickets.yml -e docker --output tests/load/reports/report.json"
scripts.load:report: mkdir -p tests/load/reports && npx artillery run tests/load/scenarios/tickets.yml --output tests/load/reports/report.json && npx artillery report tests/load/reports/report.json --output tests/load/reports/report.html
scripts.load:report:docker: docker compose -f compose.yml run --rm artillery sh -c "mkdir -p tests/load/reports && npx artillery run tests/load/scenarios/tickets.yml -e docker --output tests/load/reports/report.json && npx artillery report tests/load/reports/report.json --output tests/load/reports/report.html"
